hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; if [[ "$f" =~ \.(ts|tsx|json)$ ]]; then prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo "✓ Formatted with Prettier: $(basename $f)"; elif [[ "$f" =~ \.py$ ]]; then black "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo "✓ Formatted with Black: $(basename $f)"; fi || true
